headline: Xi to visit Pyongyang amid Putin praise; regulatory tightening on AI and tax
headline_zh: 习近平将访朝，普京赞扬中国；网信办AI测试，上市公司补税增多
narrative: A major diplomatic signal dominates the day: Xi Jinping will visit North Korea, his first since 2019, underscoring Beijing's commitment to the Sino-DPRK relationship amid stalled Russia-Ukraine talks and US non-neutral posture. Putin's endorsement of China's global role further reinforces the 'no limits' partnership narrative. Domestically, the regulatory state is active: the Cyberspace Administration launches AI-for-security tests while listed companies face a rising tide of back taxes, suggesting tighter enforcement of tax preferences. Markets were mixed with the SSE edging up 0.43% but tech-heavy ChiNext falling 0.82%, reflecting selective sentiment.
narrative_zh: 今日最重要的外交信号：习近平将访问朝鲜，这是2019年以来的首次，凸显北京对中朝关系的承诺，同时俄乌谈判停滞、美国自认非中立。普京对中国的赞扬进一步强化了‘无上限’伙伴关系的叙事。国内方面，监管动作频繁：网信办启动人工智能赋能网络安全测试，上市公司补税案例同比增加，暗示税收优惠审查趋严。市场涨跌互现，上证微涨0.43%，但创业板指跌0.82%，反映市场情绪分化。
